result.summary: Recorded Airbnb’s public developer integration surface as two partner REST APIs (Homes API and Activities API) documented at developer.airbnb.com, both requiring an Airbnb-issued OAuth app; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.

airbnb_oauth_app.label: Airbnb API partner OAuth app
airbnb_oauth_app.setup: Join an Airbnb API Program through [Airbnb API Documentation](https://developer.airbnb.com) / Partner Portal. The [API Terms of Service](https://www.airbnb.com/help/article/3418) state your organization must participate in an API Program and complete registration requirements such as agreeing to terms, signing required agreements, and passing a security review before access is granted. For user authorization, Airbnb exposes an authorization endpoint at `https://www.airbnb.com/oauth2/auth` and a token endpoint at `https://api.airbnb.com/v2/oauth2/authorizations?_unwrapped=true`. The detected scope is `ai_agent`.
